perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with blonde hair wearing a blue oversized satin shirt struggles to lift a large translucent storage bin filled with clothes. (2) She sits on top of the bin, smiling and gesturing, then begins to open it to show the contents. (3) She pulls out a silver sequined dress and holds it up to the camera. (4) She is shown wearing the silver dress, posing and laughing while adjusting the straps. (5) A hand from off-camera brings a blue-grey long gown, which she then changes into. (6) While wearing the blue-grey gown, she looks at a smartphone held by an off-camera person showing a photo of her at a past event. (7) She changes into a final outfit consisting of a black spaghetti strap top and a long, sheer black floral skirt, performing playful poses. (8) She gestures toward text on the screen while smiling at the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo pop background music starts as a female voice speaks excitedly in Mandarin, followed by the sound of a heavy bin sliding on the floor. (2) Laughter and sparkly sound effects (SFX) occur as she shows the first dress. (3) Throughout the video, there are various meme-style SFX like 'ding', 'whoosh', and background crowd reaction sounds (gasping, cheering). (4) A second female voice is heard laughing off-camera in response to the creator. (5) The music continues at a consistent volume with transitions synchronized to the outfit changes, ending with a final upbeat flourish.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '天啊 好重' (Tone: Dramatic/Funny). (2) '主持人服' (Tone: Informative). (3) '走鐘獎第一屆' (Tone: Descriptive). (4) '走鐘獎第二屆' (Tone: Descriptive). (5) 'LMS冠軍賽' (Tone: Descriptive). (6) '銀閃閃' (Tone: Playful). (7) '抓到！' (Tone: Humorous). (8) '完全不一樣！' (Tone: Surprised). (9) '豬五花' (Tone: Humorous). (10) 'AEA星光電競大賞' (Tone: Informative). (11) '有在接主持！歡迎各大廠商聯絡！' (Tone: Professional/Call-to-Action).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Outfit Reveal 1 -> Outfit Reveal 2 -> Outfit Reveal 3 -> Business CTA

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator on screen, 1 set of female-appearing hands holding a phone/clothes off-camera
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with dyed blonde hair, initially in a blue satin shirt, later in various formal evening gowns.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A minimalist white wall with a black door frame and a light switch; a large plastic storage bin on the floor.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a portfolio showcase for the creator's professional hosting career. By displaying various high-end dresses worn at significant industry events (like the Walk Bell Awards), she establishes her experience and versatility. The playful tone maintains fan engagement while the explicit contact information at the end indicates a primary goal of attracting new business collaborations and hosting opportunities.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of business contact email and invitation for manufacturers to contact her.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-pitched enthusiastic laughter, use of colorful variety-show style text effects.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively bridges personal lifestyle content (closet unboxing) with professional self-marketing, leveraging social proof through photos of past prestigious events.
